title: S10E03: The Manuscript — al-Qarawiyyin trace, pre-Vassago 11.4 Hz, Tyler age disclosure (twelve)
body: --findings Camera Op traces manuscripts from Rabat to al-Qarawiyyin in Fez (Marinid transfer, 14th c). CAVE-001 Day 2: mechanism returns partial signal at 11.4 Hz (PRE-VASSAGO) and the number 12. Tyler's first age disclosure: 'I was here when I was twelve.' Camera Op traveling to Fez. Build 0105.
